top_signals.title: Gold Falls Most in Two Months as Jobs Fuel Fed Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold fell the most in more than two months as robust US jobs data fueled bets that the Federal Reserve will likely raise interest rates this year, a headwind for the precious metal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Sinks 4% as Fed-Hike Wagers Lift Yields: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street’s historic weekly run came to a halt, with stocks hit by a tech selloff and higher bond yields as a solid jobs report added to bets the Federal Reserve’s next rate move will be a hike.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta weighs big equity raising after blockbuster Google deal
top_signals.summary: Facebook parent could sell tens of billions of dollars in new stock as it seeks to finance AI infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Rally Spurs Nigeria to Weigh Refinancing High-Cost Debt - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Rally Spurs Nigeria to Weigh Refinancing High-Cost Debt  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
